## Summary

Adds a full CostOps Dashboard at `/admin/costs` — admin-only, gated by the existing `requireAdmin` + email allowlist (`tsavobc@hotmail.com`).

The dashboard aggregates LLM cost data from the `job_costs` table and presents:
- **KPI cards**: today's spend, month-to-date, projected month-end, avg cost per evaluation
- **Budget tracking**: progress bar with configurable monthly budget via `COSTOPS_MONTHLY_BUDGET_USD` env var
- **Secondary KPIs**: last 7 days, total API calls, jobs tracked, failed spend, top model, top phase
- **Alerts**: auto-generated alerts for over-budget, projected over-budget, high daily spend, wasted spend on failures, model concentration risk
- **Provider status**: OpenAI, Supabase, Vercel connectivity/config status
- **Breakdown tables**: spend by model and by pipeline phase with tokens and avg cost per call
- **Job cost table**: top 50 most expensive jobs with status, phases, tokens, and timestamps
- Auto-refresh toggle (30s interval)

Styled with RevisionGrade brand tokens (rg-ink, rg-gold, rg-cream) matching the existing admin hub.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `lib/admin/costops.ts` — new data layer (aggregation, alerts, provider status)
- `app/api/admin/costs/route.ts` — new admin-gated API endpoint
- `app/admin/costs/page.tsx` — new dashboard page
- `app/admin/page.tsx` — added CostOps card under Diagnostics

**Does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation pipeline, scoring, or model routing logic
- Existing cost tracking in `lib/jobs/cost.ts` (read-only consumer)
- Any non-admin routes

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Dashboard queries all rows from `job_costs` table — paginated in batches of 1000. If the table grows very large (100K+ rows), consider adding date-range filtering. Currently fine for early-stage volume.
- No Supabase migration needed — reads from existing `job_costs` table.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — read-only dashboard, no evaluation pipeline changes.
